messages.content: Hello. My name is Anna and writing a thesis on female clothing in TV-series. Can you help me? I really need your help. I watchted 100 TV-series last year and feel a lot of stress. I really need your help.

Hi Anna! I'd be happy to help you with your thesis on female clothing in TV-series. It sounds like an interesting topic! Please let me know specifically what kind of help you're looking for, and I'll do my best to assist you.

Thanks. Tell me more TV-series when one or several characters wear frequently form-fitting bodycon dresses? characters in age 30-60. TV-series from 2005 to today. Good examples what i’m looking for is, Jessica Pearson in “Suits”, Camille Saroyan in “Bones”, Wendy Rhoades in “Billions”, Victoria Grayson in “Revenge”, Joan Holloway in “Mad Men, Diana St. Tropez in "Great News" and Selina Meyer "Veep" wears. Try to analyze the example women to give me the best output. Choice other women than in the examples. In this case it is more important that the outfits show off much off their body figure rather giving a sophistic look.

Certainly, I understand what you're looking for. Here are some TV-series where one or more female characters frequently wear form-fitting bodycon dresses:

1. Olivia Pope in "Scandal" (played by Kerry Washington) - As a powerful and stylish fixer, Olivia often wears bodycon dresses that accentuate her figure while projecting confidence and authority.

2. Annalise Keating in "How to Get Away with Murder" (played by Viola Davis) - Annalise Keating is known for her professional attire, often opting for form-fitting dresses that reflect her strong personality.

3. Miranda Hobbes in "Sex and the City" (played by Cynthia Nixon) - Miranda's wardrobe in the series often features bodycon dresses that portray her sophisticated yet sexy personality.

4. Joan Watson in "Elementary" (played by Lucy Liu) - Joan Watson's character in the series often wears elegant and fitted dresses that highlight her figure and add a touch of glamour to her professional look.

5. Alicia Florrick in "The Good Wife" (played by Julianna Margulies) - Throughout the series, Alicia is seen in form-fitting bodycon dresses that compliment her figure and enhance her professional appearance.

When analyzing these characters and their outfits, you can focus on elements such as the fit, color choices, accessories, and the overall portrayal of their characters. Additionally, you could consider how the costumes may influence the character's personality and empower their representation on screen.
